title: Subitem column deletion
excerpt: We had a column deleted from the subitems one of our boards.  I then went into the trash and found the column and chose it to be restored, but the column was not restored.  Any advice would be great.

posts.author: audian_benp (Benjamin ParkerMeyer)
posts.cookedHtml: We had a column deleted from the subitems one of our boards. I then went into the trash and found the column and chose it to be restored, but the column was not restored. Any advice would be great.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d recommend reaching out to Support then. Maybe they can assist.

posts.author: Digipanda (DigipandaAi)
posts.cookedHtml: then it will have restored .please refresh it in another tab.

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Benjamin! Thanks for flagging this with us in the Community. From your initial post, this behavior sounded atypical to me. However, to echo Digipanda, if you restored the subitem column and it no longer appears in the Trash, I’d double check the board to see if it appears there now. Hopefully, that is the case!

Refreshing your screen should help to reset the platform. If you want to take it a step further, open the board in a private or incognito window to review your Trash folder and board. Opening a private/incognito window ensures that the local data in your original web browser window does not impact platform performance.

If the column is still missing, definitely write into monday Support via email (support@monday.com) or live chat. This may need to be escalated to the Technical team for further investigation.
